ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sizes" (
  "size_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each size */,
  "size_name" TEXT /* Name of the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S) */,
  "fit_size" TEXT /* Fit size (e.g., 00, 0-2, 2-4) */,
  "sizing_system" TEXT /* Sizing system (e.g., US, EU, UK) */,
  "fit_type" TEXT /* Fit type (e.g., slim fit, regular fit, loose fit) */,
  "bust_min" REAL /* Minimum bust measurement in inches */,
  "bust_max" REAL /* Maximum bust measurement in inches */,
  "waist_min" REAL /* Minimum waist measurement in inches */,
  "waist_max" REAL /* Maximum waist measurement in inches */,
  "hips_min" REAL /* Minimum hip measurement in inches */,
  "hips_max" REAL /* Maximum hip measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_min" REAL /* Minimum shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "shoulder_max" REAL /* Maximum shoulder measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length_min" REAL /* Minimum sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "sleeve_length_max" REAL /* Maximum sleeve length measurement in inches */,
  "inseam_min" REAL /* Minimum inseam measurement in inches */,
  "inseam_max" REAL /* Maximum inseam measurement in inches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clothing_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each clothing item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the clothing item */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the clothing item */,
  "style" TEXT /* Style of the clothing item (e.g., top, bottom, dress) */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size associated with the clothing item */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender for which the clothing item is designed (Male, Female, Unisex) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the clothing item */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the clothing item */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the clothing item */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Available stock quantity of the clothing item */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the item was added to the database */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the item was updated in the database */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_clothing_items_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "size_id" INTEGER /* ID of the size associated with the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the customer */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the customer */,
  "shoulder_width" REAL /* Shoulder width of the customer */,
  "sleeve_length" REAL /* Sleeve length of the customer */,
  "inseam_length" REAL /* Inseam length of the customer */,
  "fit_preference" TEXT /* Customer's preferred fit type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the customer account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customers_size_id FOREIGN KEY ("size_id") REFERENCES sizes ("size_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the clothing item ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was made */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the clothing item ordered */,
  "total_price" REAL /* Total price of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., Pending, Shipped, Delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Shipping address for the order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the order was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last date and time the order was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES clothing_items ("item_id")
)
column_names: Name of the size (e.g., XXS, XS, S)
Fit type (e.g., slim fit, regular fit, loose fit)
Minimum sleeve length measurement in inches
Maximum sleeve length measurement in inches
Unique identifier for each clothing item

ID of the size associated with the clothing item

Date and time the item was added to the database
Last date and time the item was updated in the database
ID of the size associated with the customer
Date and time the customer account was created
Last date and time the customer account was updated
